text.title: Unit Testing (FIRST + AAA) Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether unit-testing applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the code under test a pure function or method (no I/O)?

branch.when: yes AND test has multiple sections
yes AND multiple cases share input
test depends on wall clock or RNG

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
